title: Defile
body:
Defile

Become an inkling, eclipse the sun and paint the world, Black.

## Features ### Items / Blocks - Funeral Ink - A multi-facet block that can cover any solid side of blocks. - Slows down entities and prevents sprinting. - Can be placed on top of water to allow inklings to walk on it. - Sun Effigy - Obtained by crafting a + shape of gold blocks with a sunflower in the middle. - Eclispes the sun when dropped in Funeral Ink (read more below). - Totem of Uncleansing - A new totem variant dropped by Evokers, if killed while holding a Sun Effigy. - Allows the user to become Inklings upon death (5 minutes, read more below). ### Inkmorphosis / Inkling - A new effect turning the player into a Splatoon inspired ink creature, much more at ease on Funeral Ink than out of it. - Removes the hunger mechanic and offers instead a very slow passive regeneration. - Removes sprinting but instead offers a new ability: Diving. - Toggled by using the sprint key. - Makes the user invulnerable to most damage (excluding out of world and explosive damage), and prevents targetting from (basic AI, brain users unaffected) hostile mobs. - Regenerates health at a fast rate (same as full saturation). - Allows Inklings to spread Funeral Ink, including on water, allowing them to walk / dive atop it. - Prevents all fall damage: any fall damage taken will put the user in dive mode. ### Eclipse & Black Rain - Triggered by dunking a Sun Effigy in Funeral Ink, lasts 2 hours. - Refreshes Inkmorphosis effect timers for Inklings as long as it lasts. - Gradually covers areas around inklings in Funeral Ink. ### Supporter Bonuses For Ko-Fi and YouTube members, you get additional perks: - Inkling Cosmetics: - You can open the customization menu by right-clicking a Totem of Uncleansing while as an Inkling. - Super Silly Supporter Commands: - Debug commands to mess around with that affect the entire save; while they reset on client or server restart, be careful with them! - Accessed with **/defile** (minus **/defile blackRain [duration]**, that one everyone has access to). ## Gallery ![An Inkling in the Black Rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DfvI9QGt/images/d454937cba23ae54f242208949b8614c2b7f14d0.png) ![The Eclipsed Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DfvI9QGt/images/c464230a6a3c94c8a1f3d42ed9b85733b79e42e9.png) ![Some of the Supporter Inkling Cosmetics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DfvI9QGt/images/52f42f3194dcb530acb35f4d2602c8e055798680.png) ## [Full Credits](https://doctor4t.dev/credits/defile)
